research.title: Your Opus Prompts Are Hurting Fable 5: The De-Prescribing Guide
research.whyTrending: Anthropic's own migration guide says over-prescriptive prior-model prompts reduce Fable 5 output quality. Counter-intuitive, shareable, and nobody has written the practical before/after version.

seo.suggestedTitle: Your Opus Prompts Are Hurting Fable 5: A De-Prescribing Guide

strategy.angle: Counter-intuitive and backed by Anthropic's own migration guide: the prompt scaffolding you built for weaker models actively reduces Fable 5 output quality. Practical before/after rewrites nobody else has published
strategy.title: Your Opus Prompts Are Hurting Fable 5: A De-Prescribing Guide
strategy.excerpt: I deleted a third of my system prompt and Fable 5 got better. Why prescriptive prompts backfire on stronger models, with before/after rewrites you can steal.
outline: What to keep and add (behavior, not process)
